name: Omnibus
longDescription:
Omnibus is an all-in-one, self-hosted comic book and manga app built with Next.js. It combines a reader, library manager, metadata editor, and a download/automation pipeline into one web app.

This stack bundles Omnibus with a Redis sidecar (required). Note: Omnibus is beta software and currently ships amd64-only images — it will not run on ARM hosts (Raspberry Pi, etc.) without emulation.
description: Self-hosted all-in-one comic book and manga reader/manager (Next.js). Beta, amd64-only.
